name: Lumen Technologies, Inc.
description: Lumen Technologies, Inc. is an American multinational telecommunications company that provides a wide range of services, including network, security, cloud, voice, and managed communications. Headquartered in Monroe, Louisiana, the company operates an extensive global fiber optic network, enabling businesses to leverage emerging applications and next-generation technologies. Formerly known as CenturyLink, Lumen focuses on digital transformation, helping enterprises navigate complex technological landscapes through its robust infrastructure, data centers, and cloud computing solutions. It stands as one of the largest telecommunications providers in the United States, dedicated to connecting people and businesses through advanced digital connectivity.
